basic_details.job_title: IIITM Gwalior Non Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Assistant Engineer, Junior Engineer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior (IIITM Gwalior) Technical positions Notification 2026 has been released on 07 May 2026 on the official website of IIITM Gwalior . A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIITM Gwalior Technical positions Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Assistant Engineer: Max 35 years (OBC), Junior Engineer: Max 32 years (SC)
age_limit.details: Assistant Engineer: Maximum age limit is 35 years for OBC candidates. Junior Engineer: Maximum age limit is 32 years for SC candidates. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: 1st Class B.E./B.Tech. or Diploma in Electrical/Civil Engineering, Post qualification experience from IITs/IISc/IIMs/IIITs/NITs/IISERs or similar institutions/Govt Organizations/PSUs
qualification.details: Assistant Engineer (Electrical): 1st Class Diploma in Electrical Engineering or equivalent Degree with 08 Years of post-qualification Experience OR 1st Class B.E./B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering or equivalent Degree with 06 Years of post-qualification Experience. Experience must be in regular scale from institutions like IITs/IISc/IIMs/IIITs/NITs/IISERs or similar Centrally/State funded institutions/Government Organizations/Public Sectors Units. Junior Engineer (Civil): 1st Class Diploma in Civil Engineering or equivalent Diploma with 05 Years of post-qualification Experience OR 1st Class B.E./B.Tech. in Civil Engineering or equivalent Degree with 02 Years of post-qualification Experience. Experience must be in regular scale from institutions like IITs/IISc/IIMs/IIITs/NITs/IISERs or similar Centrally funded institutions/Government Organizations/Public Sectors Units.

salary_details.details: Assistant Engineer (Electrical): Level 7 (as per 7th CPC) Junior Engineer (Civil): Level-6 (as per 7th CPC)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIITM Gwalior Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIITM Gwalior Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the IIITM Gwalior Recruitment 2026 is 01 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for Technical positions in the IIITM Gwalior Recruitment 2026. These include one Assistant Engineer (Electrical) and one Junior Engineer (Civil).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the posts?
faq.answer: For Assistant Engineer (Electrical), a 1st Class Diploma or B.E./B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering with relevant post-qualification experience is required. For Junior Engineer (Civil), a 1st Class Diploma or B.E./B.Tech. in Civil Engineering with relevant post-qualification experience is needed.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The age limit varies by post and category. For Assistant Engineer, the maximum age is 35 years for OBC. For Junior Engineer, the maximum age is 32 years for SC. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Assistant Engineer (Electrical) post is Level 7 as per the 7th CPC. For the Junior Engineer (Civil) post, the salary is Level-6 as per the 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the IIITM Gwalior Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1000/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 500/- for SC/ST candidates. This fee needs to be submitted along with the application form.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these technical positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Technical positions at IIITM Gwalior will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview or Trade Test. Candidates must clear both stages to be considered for appointment.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any relaxation in age for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be provided to candidates belonging to reserved categories as per the norms set by the Government of India. Specific details can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the IIITM Gwalior Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and the application form can be downloaded from the official website of IIITM Gwalior. Links for the same are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
